data.content: Tests already shipped to main as part of merge commit 9c9340b340d6. Coverage includes: rolling filter semantics (lease-audit-filters.test.ts, 10 tests), combined-series aggregation (lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts), and per-step leaderboard margin calculations (lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts). Total 2237 tests passing, 165 suites. All quality gates green.
